title: Azurite
description: A simple mod that adds a frosty crystal with mystical properties called Azurite.
body:
Mod that adds a set of blocks that are a blue reskin of amethyst. They generate in geodes, surrounded by ice. They have some function in crafting. They also are emissive and give off light.

Adds the Blocks:
- Azurite Shard
- Azurite Cluster
- Azurite Block
- Azurite Bud

As well as the items you can craft:
- Azurite Mask, which makes you invisible at the cost of speed and jumping.
- Azurite Mirror, which exposes all entities within a radius by making them spectral.
